commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: replace dev_read_only patch with dm-flakey
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: replace dev_read_only patch with dm-flakey

This is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly envdefinitions=ONLY=84 \
